summary: Completed comprehensive testing of D&D DM Screen app. All 35 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified auth, campaign management, all 8 dashboard tabs, calendar functionality, and DM Screen features. Color scheme correctly implemented with dark blue background (#0a1628), light blue primary (#38bdf8), and hot pink accents (#ff1f8f).
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testability
Color scheme CSS variables correctly defined in App.css
AI integration properly excludes MongoDB _id fields in all responses
seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically with TEST_ prefix during test runs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested: Auth (register/login), Campaign CRUD, Dashboard 8 tabs (Setting, Gods, NPCs, Locations, Players, Combat Creator, Calendar, In-Game Notes), DM Screen (Players panel, NPCs panel, Quick Notes with AI, Rules Reference with search). Calendar advance time and event creation working. Color scheme: dark blue bg #0a1628, light blue primary #38bdf8, hot pink accent #ff1f8f

features_tested.user_registration: PASS - Form works, redirects to campaigns
features_tested.user_login: PASS - Login form functional, token stored
features_tested.campaign_creation: PASS - Modal opens, form submits, campaign appears in list
features_tested.campaign_listing: PASS - Shows campaign cards with system badge
features_tested.dashboard_tabs_navigation: PASS - All 8 tabs present and clickable
features_tested.calendar_tab: PASS - View calendar, advance time, add events all working
features_tested.calendar_add_event: PASS - Event form submits, event appears in list
features_tested.dm_screen_rules_search: PASS - Search finds matches and highlights
features_tested.color_scheme: PASS - Dark blue bg, light blue primary, hot pink accents verified

color_scheme_verification.accent: #ff1f8f - Hot pink buttons and highlights confirmed
